care.summary: Versatile vining or bushy plant with arrow-shaped leaves in green, pink, or white tones.
care.water: Keep slightly moist; water when top inch is dry
care.soil: Peat-based mix with perlite for drainage
care.fertilizer: Balanced feed every 4 weeks in spring/summer
common_issues: Brown leaf edges from dry air
tips: Color varieties need more light for vivid tones
